name: legal-field-consultancy-firms
description: Production-ready legal appointment scheduling SaaS built with React, Express, Prisma, and MySQL.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:demo --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:demo --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace server
